GREMLINS-AGGRESSIVE_DEFENSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, the enemy loses {BashedPower:diff()} HP.
GREMLINS-AGGRESSIVE_DEFENSE.title: 以攻代守
GREMLINS-ARMS_THEFT.title: 力量窃取
GREMLINS-ASTOUND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have 3 or more [gold]Wiz[/gold], gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wards{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold].
GREMLINS-ASTOUND.title: 惊愕
GREMLINS-BELLOW.description:
Gain {StrengthBase:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each enemy that does not intend to Attack.{InCombat:cond:
(Gain {Strength} [gold]Strength[/gold])|}
GREMLINS-BELLOW.title: 怒吼
GREMLINS-BROKEN_SHIN.description:
Apply [gold]Agony[/gold] for every {WeakDiv:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] the target has.{IsTargeting:
(Apply {Agony:preview()} [gold]Agony[/gold])|}
GREMLINS-BROKEN_SHIN.title: 破胫
GREMLINS-BUBBLE_BARRIER.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain {BubbleBarrierPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
GREMLINS-BUBBLE_BARRIER.title: 气泡屏障
GREMLINS-BULK_UP.title: 巨大化
GREMLINS-BURLY_BLOW.title: 迅猛一击
GREMLINS-CAT_SCRATCH.title: 挠脸
GREMLINS-CHANGE_O.title: 变换!
GREMLINS-CONGA_LINE.description: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and [gold]Swap[/gold] to the next Gremlin.
GREMLINS-CONGA_LINE.title: 一字长蛇
GREMLINS-COUNTER_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, trigger your current Gremlin's Bonus {Repeat:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-COUNTER_STRIKE.title: 破招打击
GREMLINS-DAGGER_DANCE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-DAGGER_DANCE.title: 匕首舞
GREMLINS-DAZZLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have 3 or more [gold]Wiz[/gold],
[gold]Steal[/gold] {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
GREMLINS-DAZZLE.title: 耀眼
GREMLINS-DEFEND_GREMLINS.title: 防御
GREMLINS-DUPLICATE.description:
Choose an Attack.
[gold]Echo[/gold] it {Cards:diff()} times.
These Echoes cost 1 less.
GREMLINS-DUPLICATE.title: 复刻
GREMLINS-EDIBLE_ARMOR.title: 饕餮甲胄
GREMLINS-ENCORE.title: 喝彩
GREMLINS-ENTHUSIASM.title: 狂热
GREMLINS-ERUPT.title: 火力爆发
GREMLINS-EXACERBATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you apply [gold]Weak[/gold] to this enemy, they lose {CrippledPower:diff()} HP.
GREMLINS-EXACERBATE.title: 恶化
GREMLINS-FAIRY_DUST.title: 仙尘
GREMLINS-FEEL_THE_AUDIENCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {WizPower:diff()} [gold]Wiz[/gold] for each one that intends to attack.
GREMLINS-FEEL_THE_AUDIENCE.title: 察言观色
GREMLINS-FLEX.title: 力量下降
GREMLINS-FLIP_OUT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you would gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, instead deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
GREMLINS-FLIP_OUT.title: 发疯
GREMLINS-FLURRY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each card played this turn.{InCombat:cond:
(Hits {Repeat} {Repeat:plural:time|times})|}
GREMLINS-FLURRY.title: 乱舞
GREMLINS-FOR_THE_LEADER.title: 永远别放弃
GREMLINS-FURY.description:
Costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less for every {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] you have.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-FURY.title: 狂怒
GREMLINS-GLIMMER.title: 黯光
GREMLINS-GLITTER_GUARD.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wards{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Swap[/gold] to Shield Gremlin.
GREMLINS-GLITTER_GUARD.title: 闪光守卫
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_ARMS.description: Trigger your current Gremlin's Bonus{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}, then [gold]Swap[/gold] to a living Gremlin of your choice.
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_ARMS.title: 地精武器
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_DANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage{GremlinVariant:choose(None|MadGremlin|SneakGremlin|ShieldGremlin|FatGremlin|WizardGremlin|GremlinNob):.
Has a bonus effect based on which Gremlin you are.| to ALL enemies|.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.|.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].|.
Enemy loses 2 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.|.
Gain 2 [gold]Wiz[/gold].|.
Gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].}
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_DANCE.title: 地精之舞
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_OFFENSIVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add [gold]Gremlin Offensive{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_OFFENSIVE.title: 地精进攻
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_TOSS.description:
Gain {TempHP:diff()} [gold]Temp [/gold]HP.
Deal damage equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_TOSS.title: 地精投掷
GREMLINS-HECKLE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain {HecklePower:diff()} [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-HECKLE.title: 起哄
GREMLINS-INFINITE_BLOCKS.description: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Ward[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-INFINITE_BLOCKS.title: 无限护甲
GREMLINS-IRKSOME_BLOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Strength[/gold] affects this card {StrengthEffect:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-IRKSOME_BLOW.title: 烦扰一击
GREMLINS-IRRITABILITY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {IrritabilityPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Swap[/gold] to Mad Gremlin.
GREMLINS-IRRITABILITY.title: 易怒
GREMLINS-JEER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has a debuff, gain {TempHP:diff()} [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-JEER.title: 嘲讽
GREMLINS-KABLAMO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
This attack does not consume [gold]Wiz[/gold].
GREMLINS-KABLAMO.title: 轰天响！
GREMLINS-MAKESHIFT_ARMOR.title: 临时装甲
GREMLINS-MOCKERY.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
If the enemy has 3 or more [gold]Weak[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
GREMLINS-MOCKERY.title: 蔑视
GREMLINS-NECROMANCY.description:
Requires 3 [gold]Wiz[/gold].
Consume all [gold]Wiz[/gold] to resurrect a random Gremlin with {Heal:diff()} HP.
GREMLINS-NECROMANCY.title: 招魂
GREMLINS-NOB.description:
Gain {TempHP:diff()} [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
Mutate into [gold]Gremlin Nob[/gold] until you run out of [gold]Temp HP[/gold].
GREMLINS-NOB.title: 大块头
GREMLINS-PARTY_STICK.description: If this is in your Hand, whenever you [gold]Swap[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
GREMLINS-PARTY_STICK.title: 荧光棒
GREMLINS-PATSY.title: 懦夫
GREMLINS-PICKPOCKET.title: 扒手
GREMLINS-PINPRICK.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:When drawn, [gold]Echo[/gold] this.
|}Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:plural:a card|{} cards}.
GREMLINS-PINPRICK.title: 针刺
GREMLINS-PIN_NEEDLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Pinpricks{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
GREMLINS-PIN_NEEDLE.title: 缝衣针
GREMLINS-POLISH.title: 磨亮
GREMLINS-POUR_SALT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Weak[/gold], remove a stack to gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Shivs[/gold].
GREMLINS-POUR_SALT.title: 撒盐
GREMLINS-PRESTO.title: 戏法！
GREMLINS-PRETALIATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Enemy attacks you for {EnemyDamage:diff()} damage.
GREMLINS-PRETALIATION.title: 预审
GREMLINS-PROPER_TOOLS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wards[/gold].
Otherwise, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Shivs[/gold].
GREMLINS-PROPER_TOOLS.title: 恰当工具
GREMLINS-RAGE_BREAK.title: 激怒
GREMLINS-RAID.description:
Draw a card for each living Gremlin.
Discard {Cards:diff()} cards.
GREMLINS-RAID.title: 突袭
GREMLINS-REVEL.title: 狂欢
GREMLINS-RHYTHM.description:
[gold]Swap[/gold] to the next Gremlin.
Put a Basic card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. 
It's free to play this turn.
GREMLINS-RHYTHM.title: 节奏
GREMLINS-RUSH.title: 冲锋
GREMLINS-SCATTER.description: The next time you would lose HP, instead [gold]Swap[/gold] to a random Gremlin.
GREMLINS-SCATTER.title: 散开!
GREMLINS-SECOND_VOLLEY.title: 余波
GREMLINS-SHADOW_SHIV.description: Whenever you play an Attack that doesn't [gold]Exhaust[/gold], gain a [gold]Shiv[/gold].
GREMLINS-SHADOW_SHIV.title: 暗影刀刃
GREMLINS-SHANK_STONE.description: Whenever you draw this card, add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Shivs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-SHANK_STONE.title: 刀石
GREMLINS-SHARPEN_BLADES.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw a card.
|}ALL Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold] are free to play this turn.
GREMLINS-SHARPEN_BLADES.title: 锐化刀片
GREMLINS-SHOW_OF_HANDS.title: 表决
GREMLINS-SHOW_STOPPER.description:
Can only be played if you have exactly 7 [gold]Wiz[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
GREMLINS-SHOW_STOPPER.title: 炫耀
GREMLINS-SKULL_BASH.title: 颅骨重击
GREMLINS-SLEEVE_OF_ACES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Shiv{IfUpgraded:plus()}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each [gold]Wiz[/gold] you have.
GREMLINS-SLEEVE_OF_ACES.title: 袖中王牌
GREMLINS-STRIKE_GREMLINS.title: 打击
GREMLINS-STUPEND.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Block[/gold] is affected by [gold]Wiz[/gold].
GREMLINS-STUPEND.title: 惊人
GREMLINS-TADAH.description:
Add 1 [gold]Ward{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Swap[/gold] to Gremlin Wizard.
GREMLINS-TADAH.title: 嗒哒！
GREMLINS-TAG_TEAM.description: [gold]Swap[/gold] to a living Gremlin of your choice.
GREMLINS-TAG_TEAM.title: 配合
GREMLINS-TARGET_WOUNDS.title: 瞄准伤口
GREMLINS-TOE_STUB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Weak[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
GREMLINS-TOE_STUB.title: 肿指
GREMLINS-TRICKSY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards, then discard any that are not Attacks.
[gold]Swap[/gold] to Sneaky Gremlin.
GREMLINS-TRICKSY.title: 狡猾
GREMLINS-TWIST_THE_KNIFE.title: 捻刀
GREMLINS-UNFORGIVING.title: 无情
GREMLINS-WHIZ.description:
Gain {WizPower:diff()} [gold]Wiz[/gold].
Next turn, add a [gold]Bang{IfUpgraded:plus()}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GREMLINS-WHIZ.title: 咏唱
GREMLINS-WIZARDRY.description: At the start of your turn, gain {WizardryPower:diff()} [gold]Wiz[/gold].
GREMLINS-WIZARDRY.title: 巫术
GREMLINS-WARD.title: 守卫
GREMLINS-BANG.title: 砰
GREMLINS-BANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Whiz{IfUpgraded:plus()}[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
